decision_reason: no previous ghost-state exists; create the first external ghost state

network_role.N1: branch Raw shadow/release drives the next state phase
network_role.N2: this JSON state is written back to the external riverbed repo
network_role.N3: cycles run without user input after start
network_role.N4: local mirror and commit Raw are compared after each write

truth_boundary: This is a low-frequency network-state machine. Local CPU still observes, hashes, commits, and pushes; public Raw/CDN supplies external state, shadow, and release timing.
